## 🔥 About this resource pack
 

#### The Clean Hotbar resource pack in Minecraft simplifies your inventory interface. It streamlines icons and layout for easy item management. This pack offers a neat and modern aesthetic for a cleaner gameplay experience. Enjoy a tidier Minecraft with the Clean Hotbar resource pack
